Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}Nothing's happening nowadays... I guess that's what peace means.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}How about you? Anything dramatic happening in your life?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}I see... Sounds tough. Well, good luck with whatever it is![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}See? Nothing really is happening...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}I heard a buncha stuff is happening out there. How about it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}Is anything happening out there with you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}Oh, cool. Well, not here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}I keep hearing about this stuff, but I never get to see it. Is it all just a joke?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}Dude, that rumor is just getting started! This time, I hear it's about couples![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}The culprit must be a single guy... He's jealous of couples, see?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}But man, if I had that kind of power, I'd get myself a woman![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}I heard it's almost time for the summer festival. Dammit... I don't have anyone to go with.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}Oh well... I'll find someone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}I heard there's a summer festival going on at the shrine. Dammit... I don't have anyone to go with.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}Well, I'm sure it wouldn't be that much fun anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}Oh yeah, there was that summer festival, huh? Dammit... I didn't have anyone to go with.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}Oh well. It probably wasn't that great.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}Did you know the wiring here was in bad shape?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}We just barely squeaked by during some big events.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}The weird thing is it's fixed now, but nobody ever called maintenance...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}I heard a Gekkoukan student died in a fight at that spot.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}I could have told anyone that place was trouble! I swear, man![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}I knew something bad was gonna happen there one of these days![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}Gekkoukan's chairman fell from the observatory while stargazing, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}Doesn't something about that picture strike you as odd...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}What do you think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}Maybe he liked stars so much he... fell trying to reach for them? I don't know, man...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}But if it's a lie, it must be to cover something up, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}That's crazy, man! It's just like a movie![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}Dude, check out my arm. Whenever I feel something "off," I get goosebumps...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}I get 'em when I'm just walking down the street.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}Isn't this town weird, man?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}Dude, this town is filthy! No joke![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}Especially those posters! I keep seeing those damn cultists putting them up![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 409}Why don't you go dance, man? You'll feel a little better.[n]{f 1 1}
